narrative:
Canton City has 38,307 registered voters, with 63.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.9 percentage points.
